_doc: ggml-org/llama.cpp or unslothai/llama.cpp PRs to merge into the nightly prebuilds (no
other repos). Each entry pins an exact commit -- copy the url of the commit you
reviewed from the PR's commits tab:
Only that commit is built, even if the author keeps pushing; update the pin to take newer code.
Closed or merged PRs are skipped automatically, and an empty list is a plain upstream build.
An unslothai PR branched off this fork's master merges that ancestry in too (workflow/
script files, upstream commits synced past the base tag), not just its own diff.
Careful: the build tree is the upstream tag + pins, never fork master, so merging an
unslothai PR into master DROPS it from the nightly; keep the pin open until the change
lands upstream or is no longer needed.
